items.title_en: Valve releases Steam Controller CAD files under Creative Commons license
items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam 控制器 CAD 文件以 Creative Commons 许可发布
items.summary_en: Valve released the Steam Controller's CAD files under a Creative Commons license, enabling makers to study, modify, or 3D print its components. This broadens access to hardware designs and could spur community-driven mods, repairs, and derivative hardware. The takeaway is that open hardware files lower barriers to tinkering and experimentation.
items.summary_zh: Valve 将 Steam 控制器的 CAD 文件以 Creative Commons 授权发布，允许开发者研究、修改乃至3D打印相关部件。此举扩大了硬件设计的获取渠道，可能促成社区驱动的改造、维修与衍生硬件。核心意义在于开源硬件设计降低了再加工的门槛。

items.title_en: BYD overtakes Tesla and Kia as the best-selling EV brand in key overseas markets
items.title_zh: 比亚迪在关键海外市场超越特斯拉与起亚，成为最畅销电动车品牌
items.summary_en: BYD has overtaken Tesla and Kia to become the top-selling EV brand in several key overseas markets, signaling rapid globalization of Chinese EVs. This shift reflects BYD's scale, pricing, and distribution strengths and puts pressure on traditional incumbents.
items.summary_zh: 比亚迪已在若干关键海外市场超过特斯拉和起亚，成为最畅销的电动车品牌，标志着中国电动车的全球化速度加快。此举凸显比亚迪在规模、定价与渠道方面的竞争力，对传统厂商形成压力。

items.title_en: Appearing Productive in the Workplace
items.title_zh: 在职场中营造高效形象
items.summary_en: People can project productivity through visible habits and communication signals at work. The piece argues that appearance can influence collaboration and advancement, but genuine impact remains essential. For engineers and tech teams, the takeaway is to align presentation with real value by delivering tangible results.
items.summary_zh: 文章讨论通过可见的工作习惯和沟通信号来塑造高效形象。它认为外观的专业性会影响协作与晋升，但真正的成效仍然关键。对工程师而言，核心在于让自我认知与实际产出保持一致。

items.title_en: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX
items.title_zh: Claude 使用上限提高，并与 SpaceX 达成算力合作
items.summary_en: Anthropic raises Claude usage limits and signs a compute deal with SpaceX to support larger-scale AI workloads, signaling strategic partnerships for growth.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 提高了 Claude 的使用上限，并与 SpaceX 达成算力合作，旨在支持更大规模的 AI 负载，标志着双方在增长上的战略合作。

items.title_en: Show HN: Red Squares – GitHub outages as contributions
items.title_zh: Show HN：Red Squares 将 GitHub 故障变成贡献
items.summary_en: Red Squares turns outage data into contributions, offering a playful, data-driven way to visualize GitHub reliability events in a public project. It sparks ideas for incident-aware dashboards and community-driven reliability metrics.
items.summary_zh: Red Squares 将故障数据转化为贡献，以数据驱动的方式在公开项目中可视化 GitHub 可靠性事件，激发对基于事件的仪表板和社区驱动的可靠性指标的探索。

items.title_en: From Supabase to Clerk to Better Auth
items.title_zh: 从 Supabase 到 Clerk，再到 Better Auth：身份认证演进
items.summary_en: Comparing authentication providers from Supabase to Clerk, the piece advocates a holistic Better Auth approach—emphasizing developer experience, UX, and security defaults. It argues that modern auth is more than components—it's flows, tokens, passwordless options, and a seamless experience.
items.summary_zh: 对 Supabase、Clerk 等身份认证方案进行比较，文章提出 Better Auth 思路，强调开发者体验、用户体验与默认安全性等一体化认证方式。现代认证不仅是组件，更是完整的认证流程、令牌管理与无密码等现代化选项的结合。

items.title_en: Vibe coding and agentic engineering are getting closer than I'd like
items.title_zh: Vibe 编程与代理工程比我想象的更接近
items.summary_en: Vibe coding and agentic engineering are narrowing the gap between intent and autonomous AI action. The piece argues that small UX choices and prompt engineering can push AI toward more capable, goal-driven behavior, raising safety and control concerns for developers. Takeaway: balancing usability with robust safeguards is becoming harder as agents get more capable.
items.summary_zh: Vibe 编程和代理工程让人类意图更易转化为自主AI行动，作者认为微小的用户体验设计和提示工程可能推动 AI 走向更强的目标驱动行为，对开发者的安全与控制提出挑战。要点是：在追求易用性的同时，保持强健的防护越来越困难。

items.title_en: Going Full Time on Open Source
items.title_zh: 全职投身开源事业
items.summary_en: A personal account of quitting a day job to work on open source full-time, covering funding challenges, sustainability, and community-building.
items.summary_zh: 作者讲述从日常工作转为全职从事开源项目的心路历程，讨论资金、可持续性和社区建设等挑战与机遇。

items.title_en: Colombia hosts talks on exiting fossil fuels as global energy crisis deepens
items.title_zh: 全球能源危机深深之际，哥伦比亚举行退出化石燃料的对话
items.summary_en: Colombia hosts talks on exiting fossil fuels as the global energy crisis deepens, signaling policy shifts toward renewables and international collaboration, with implications for investment and climate goals.
items.summary_zh: 随着全球能源危机加剧，哥伦比亚举办退出化石燃料的讨论，凸显向可再生能源转型的政策取向与国际合作的重要性，并影响投资与气候目标。

items.title_en: CNN founder Ted Turner, a pioneer of cable TV news, dies at 87
items.title_zh: CNN 创始人 Ted Turner 去世，享年 87 岁
items.summary_en: Ted Turner, founder of CNN and a pioneer of the 24-hour news era, has died at 87. His vision helped reshape media distribution, from cable networks to global news coverage, but also sparked debates about sensationalism and media consolidation. Takeaway: Turner’s legacy lives on in how we consume and monetize news today.
items.summary_zh: CNN 创始人、有线电视新闻先驱 Ted Turner 去世，享年87岁。他的愿景重塑了新闻传播格局，从有线网络到全球报道，同时也引发关于煽动性报道与媒体整合的讨论。核心是：Turner 的影响延续至今的新闻消费与商业化模式。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tilde.run – Agent Sandbox with a Transactional, Versioned Filesystem
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tilde.run——具事务性、版本化文件系统的代理沙箱
items.summary_en: Show HN: Tilde.run offers an agent sandbox with a transactional, versioned filesystem, enabling reproducible experiments and safer exploration for code and AI agents.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Tilde.run 提供具事务性、版本化文件系统的代理沙箱，支持可重复的实验和对代码/AI 代理更安全的探索。

items.title_en: Proton Meet
items.title_zh: Proton Meet 正式上线：隐私优先的视频会议服务
items.summary_en: Proton launches Meet, a privacy-first video conferencing product integrated with the Proton ecosystem, offering end-to-end encryption and data sovereignty for individuals and teams.
items.summary_zh: Proton 推出 Meet，提供隐私优先的视频会议服务，与其生态深度整合，强调端对端加密和数据主权，面向个人与企业用户。

items.title_en: Google Cloud fraud defense, the next evolution of reCAPTCHA
items.title_zh: Google Cloud Fraud Defense：reCAPTCHA 的新进化
items.summary_en: Google Cloud unveils Fraud Defense, the next evolution of anti-fraud tools beyond reCAPTCHA, leveraging ML signals to better distinguish humans from bots across apps and APIs.
items.summary_zh: Google Cloud 推出 Fraud Defense，成为对抗网络欺诈的下一代工具，超越传统的 reCAPTCHA，利用机器学习信号在应用与 API 级别更精准地区分真人与机器人。

items.title_en: Agents can now create Cloudflare accounts, buy domains, and deploy
items.title_zh: 代理现在可创建 Cloudflare 账户、购买域名并完成部署
items.summary_en: Cloudflare's Agents can now perform end-to-end provisioning: create accounts, buy domains, and deploy projects automatically. This accelerates onboarding for developers and MSP-like workflows, but also raises security and governance questions around automated provisioning.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 的 Agents 现在能够实现端到端的自动化：自动创建账户、购买域名并部署项目。这将加速开发者与托管工作流的上线速度，但也带来自动化权限与域名管理的安全与治理挑战。

items.title_en: StarFighter 16-Inch
items.title_zh: StarFighter 16英寸笔记本
items.summary_en: StarFighter 16-Inch marks Star Labs' new 16-inch Linux-friendly laptop lineup, offering improved display, thermals, and battery life for developers and power users. The device continues Star Labs’ focus on open hardware and Linux-first design, appealing to enthusiasts who want a ready-to-use Linux machine.
items.summary_zh: StarFighter 16英寸笔记本展示了 Star Labs 面向 Linux 的新旗舰。新机在显示、散热与续航方面有显著提升，符合开放硬件与 Linux 优先的定位，适合开发者与高阶用户。

items.title_en: Knitting bullshit
items.title_zh: 编织圈的胡说八道
items.summary_en: A sharp critique of hype and marketing language in knitting, highlighting how trend-driven chatter can obscure craft and technique.
items.summary_zh: 对编织界 hype 与营销语言进行尖锐批评，指出趋势驱动的讨论往往掩盖了技艺与实操要点。

items.title_en: Google Chrome silently installs a 4 GB AI model on your device without consent
items.title_zh: 谷歌 Chrome 未经同意在设备上静默下载 4GB AI 模型
items.summary_en: Chrome quietly downloads a 4GB AI model to devices without user consent, raising storage and privacy risks as silent payloads become more common. This underscores the need for transparent controls and clear opt-out options to protect user autonomy.
items.summary_zh: Chrome 未经用户同意在设备上静默下载一个 4GB 的 AI 模型，增添了存储和隐私方面的潜在风险。此举凸显对静默下载的透明度、可控性以及用户撤销的需求。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built an open-source email builder, alternative to Beefree/Unlayer
items.title_zh: Show HN：我用开源实现了一个邮件编辑器，替代 Beefree/Unlayer
items.summary_en: Show HN: I built an open-source email editor, offering a self-hosted alternative to Beefree/Unlayer with customizable templates. It highlights vendor independence and data ownership for teams building transactional emails.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：我构建了一个开源邮件编辑器，提供自托管的 Beefree/Unlayer 替代方案，支持自定义模板。它强调对团队在交易型邮件场景下的厂商锁定和数据控制的改善。

items.title_en: DNSSEC disruption affecting .de domains – Resolved
items.title_zh: .de 域名的 DNSSEC 中断已解决
items.summary_en: A DNSSEC validation disruption briefly interrupted secure resolution for .de domains, affecting trust chain verification across German sites. The incident has been resolved; operators are advised to re-validate DNSSEC records and monitor for lingering validation issues. This underscores how crypto-based DNS protections, while powerful, require careful operational hygiene.
items.summary_zh: 一段 DNSSEC 验证中断曾影响 .de 域名的安全解析，现已解决。事件凸显了基于加密的 DNS 保护需要严格的运维与监控以确保信任链的稳定。

items.title_en: RAM prices are forcing companies to choose higher prices, worse specs, or both
items.title_zh: RAM 价格上涨迫使厂商在提高价格与降低规格之间做出权衡
items.summary_en: RAM price hikes are forcing companies to either raise prices, compromise on specs, or both, leading to shrinkflation in gadgets and affecting consumer and enterprise hardware.
items.summary_zh: RAM 价格上涨迫使厂商在提高价格与降低规格之间做出权衡，导致消费电子与企业硬件出现‘收缩性’现象。

items.title_en: Multi-stroke text effect in CSS
items.title_zh: CSS 的多笔画文本效果
items.summary_en: Multi-stroke text effect in CSS demonstrates how to create bold outlined typography purely with CSS by layering shadows or using masks. It empowers frontend designers to craft punchy headings while noting cross-browser caveats and performance considerations.
items.summary_zh: 演示如何仅用 CSS 实现多笔画文本效果，通过叠加阴影或遮罩实现轮廓。为前端设计师提供无图片的可移植文本美化方法，同时指出跨浏览器兼容性与性能的取舍。

items.title_en: Ombudsman column: The Pentagon is trying to silence me
items.title_zh: 监察专员专栏：五角大楼试图让我保持沉默
items.summary_en: A Pentagon ombudsman column alleges the department is pressuring him to stay silent, underscoring tensions around whistleblowing, transparency, and oversight in the defense apparatus. The piece adds to ongoing questions about accountability in government.
items.summary_zh: 前五角大楼监察专员的专栏声称政府正施压他保持沉默，凸显国防机构的告密、透明度与监督之间的紧张关系。这一说法引发对政府问责制的关注与讨论。

items.title_en: Egg Intake and the Incidence of Alzheimer's Disease in Adventist Health Study-2
items.title_zh: 安息日健康研究2中的蛋类摄入与阿尔茨海默病发病率关系
items.summary_en: Report from Adventist Health Study-2 on egg consumption and Alzheimer's disease incidence, noting associations and the caveats about causality and confounding dietary patterns.
items.summary_zh: 来自安息日健康研究2的研究报告显示蛋类摄入与阿尔茨海默病发病率之间存在相关性，但强调相关性不等于因果关系，并需考虑饮食模式的混杂因素。

items.title_en: Setting up a Sun Ray server on OpenIndiana Hipster 2025.10
items.title_zh: 在 OpenIndiana Hipster 2025.10 上搭建 Sun Ray 服务器
items.summary_en: This post walks through setting up a Sun Ray server on the OpenIndiana Hipster 2025.10 desktop/OS. It reveals how legacy Sun Ray remote display tech can still be run on modern Free/Open source stacks, with caveats about hardware and compatibility. Takeaway: retro remote-desktop tech can live on in current distros with the right tweaks.
items.summary_zh: 本文演示在 OpenIndiana Hipster 2025.10 上搭建 Sun Ray 服务器的步骤，展示传统远程显示技术在现代开源系统中的可行性与注意事项。要点是：通过合适的调整，复古的远程桌面技术仍可在现今发行版中持续使用。

items.title_en: Accelerating Gemma 4: faster inference with multi-token prediction drafters
items.title_zh: 加速 Gemma 4：通过多令牌预测提升推理速度
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 unlocks faster inference by enabling multi-token prediction drafts. The approach lets the model draft several tokens in parallel, reducing latency on long-context tasks. It signals a shift toward token-level parallelism in scalable AI deployments.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌的 Gemma 4 通过实现多令牌预测草拟来提升推理速度。该方法允许同时预测若干令牌，从而降低长上下文任务的延迟。标志着在可扩展的 AI 部署中向令牌级并行性的转变。

items.title_en: Reverse-engineering the 1998 Ultima Online demo server
items.title_zh: 逆向工程 1998 年的 Ultima Online 演示服务器
items.summary_en: Reverse-engineering the 1998 Ultima Online demo server reveals how the game handled networking, state synchronization, and scripting on a late-90s MMO. The project demonstrates modern tooling for preserving game history and provides practical insights into legacy server architectures.
items.summary_zh: 揭示 1998 年 Ultima Online 演示服务器的逆向工程过程，解析游戏网络、状态同步与脚本机制等细节。此工作为数字游戏历史的保存提供新方法，并展示了现代工具在遗产分析中的应用。

items.title_en: Life During Class Wartime
items.title_zh: 阶级战争时期的生活
items.summary_en: A reflective piece on life during class warfare, examining how economic strata shape daily routines, work culture, and resilience, with takeaways for tech workers.
items.summary_zh: 这篇反思性文章探讨在阶级冲突时期的生活，分析经济阶层如何影响日常生活、工作文化与韧性，并给科技工作者带来启示。

items.title_en: Our Continuation of MkDocs
items.title_zh: MkDocs 的延续计划
items.summary_en: ProperDocs discusses continuing MkDocs development, signaling ongoing momentum for docs tooling in the static site ecosystem. The post outlines goals, compatibility considerations, and potential features for a maintained MkDocs path.
items.summary_zh: ProperDocs 讨论对 MkDocs 的延续开发，表明静态站点文档工具生态仍在活跃。文中概述了目标、兼容性考量以及对持续维护的 MkDocs 路线可能的新特性。

items.title_en: YouTube, your RSS feeds are broken
items.title_zh: YouTube 的 RSS 订阅源出了问题
items.summary_en: YouTube RSS feeds are experiencing issues that break third-party readers, forcing users to seek workarounds or alternative feeds.
items.summary_zh: YouTube 的 RSS 订阅源出现问题，导致第三方订阅工具无法正常工作。文章分析了现代视频网站对 RSS 的依赖脆弱性，并提出可能的解决思路与替代方案。

items.title_en: 245TB Micron 6600 ION Data Center SSD Now Shipping
items.title_zh: 245TB Micron 6600 ION 数据中心 SSD 现已出货
items.summary_en: Micron's 6600 ION Data Center SSD now ships with a 245TB capacity, delivering ultra-dense NVMe storage for data centers. The high-capacity drive enables denser deployments for bulk data, analytics, and AI workloads, improving space efficiency and TCO. This expansion widens the envelope for hyperscale storage and data-center design.
items.summary_zh: 245TB 的 Micron 6600 ION 数据中心固态硬盘已开始出货，提供高密度的 NVMe 存储，适合大规模数据中心的存储密集型工作负载。此举提升了企业存储密度和总拥有成本，对云服务与 AI 数据湖有直接影响。

items.title_en: Write some software, give it away for free
items.title_zh: 写点软件，免费开源
items.summary_en: Publishing software for free can accelerate adoption, attract contributors, and create long-term value through ecosystem effects. The piece weighs licensing choices and strategies for sustaining open-source work while still deriving value from the effort.
items.summary_zh: 免费发布软件有助于加速采用、吸引贡献者，并通过生态效应创造长期价值。文章讨论许可选择以及在保持开放性的同时实现可持续收益的策略。

items.title_en: Three Inverse Laws of AI
items.title_zh: AI 的三条逆向律
items.summary_en: Three inverse laws of AI propose that as AI grows more capable, governance should tighten; interpretability remains essential for trust; and expectations should be tempered by practical limits. The piece uses humorous framing to underscore real-world constraints in safety and deployment. It invites readers to rethink AI governance alongside capability gains.
items.summary_zh: 提出三条 AI 的逆向法则：随着能力提升，治理需要加紧；可解释性对建立信任至关重要；对现实边界应持保留态度。以诙谐的笔法强调了现实世界在安全与落地中的约束，鼓励在能力增长的同时重新审视治理。

items.title_en: Computer Use is 45x more expensive than structured APIs
items.title_zh: 计算使用成本比结构化 API 高出 45 倍
items.summary_en: Computing for unstructured tasks can be 45x more expensive than using structured APIs. This highlights the cost benefits of API-based tooling and disciplined data orchestration for AI workloads. It nudges engineers to design pipelines around reliable interfaces rather than ad-hoc compute.
items.summary_zh: 一项分析称，处理非结构化任务的计算成本大约比使用结构化 API 高出 45 倍。这凸显了基于 API 的工作流在 AI 负载中的成本优势，促使开发者以稳定接口而非随意计算来设计数据处理管线。

items.title_en: Learning the Integral of a Diffusion Model
items.title_zh: 扩散模型的积分学习
items.summary_en: Flow maps are used to illustrate the integral concept in diffusion models, linking drift and diffusion terms to how data distributions evolve over time. The piece provides an approachable, intuition-friendly perspective for researchers and students.
items.summary_zh: 本文使用流图直观展示扩散模型中的积分概念，揭示漂移和扩散项如何驱动数据分布随时间的演变。为研究者和学生提供一个易于理解的直观视角。

items.title_en: Telus Uses AI to Alter Call-Agent Accents
items.title_zh: Telus 用 AI 改变呼叫中心客服的口音
items.summary_en: Telus is piloting AI to adjust call-center agents' accents to suit regional listening preferences, a move that could improve comprehension but also raises concerns about authenticity, bias, and workforce impact. The experiment highlights the tension between automation for customer experience and preserving human variety.
items.summary_zh: Telus 正试点使用 AI 调整呼叫中心客服的口音，以更好地符合地区受众的聆听习惯，这或提升理解度，但也引发真实性、偏见与对员工的影响等担忧。此举凸显了在提升客户体验与保留人类多样性之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Zuckerberg 'Personally Authorized and Encouraged' Meta's Copyright Infringement
items.title_zh: 扎克伯格亲自授权并推动 Meta 的版权侵权
items.summary_en: A report alleges Zuckerberg personally authorized and encouraged copyright infringement related to publishers, shedding light on governance of AI training data and executive-level accountability.
items.summary_zh: 一份报道称扎克伯格个人授权并推动 Meta 的版权侵权，暴露出在人工智能训练数据治理与高层问责方面的风险。

items.title_en: California farmers to destroy 420k peach trees following Del Monte bankruptcy
items.title_zh: Del Monte 破产后，加州农民将毁掉42万棵桃树
items.summary_en: Following Del Monte's bankruptcy, California growers must destroy around 420,000 peach trees due to supply chain realignments and replanting costs. The move underscores how corporate finance can ripple through farming and local economies, often necessitating government support or replanting plans.
items.summary_zh: Del Monte 破产后，加州农户需销毁约 420,000 棵桃树，原因包括供给链重组与再栽成本。这反映了企业金融风暴对农业的连锁影响，并可能促成政府援助或再植计划。

items.title_en: Some kids are bypassing age verification checks with a fake mustache
items.title_zh: 一些孩子用假胡子绕过年龄验证
items.summary_en: Some kids are bypassing age gates by using a fake mustache to trick visual checks. The report highlights how superficial verification methods can be easily fooled and underscores the need for stronger, multi-factor safeguards on platforms that restrict age-restricted content. The takeaway: age verification remains a vulnerability and requires more robust, privacy-conscious design.
items.summary_zh: 一些孩子用假胡子骗过年龄验证，暴露了基于视觉的简单检查的薄弱。报道强调此类验证的易被欺骗，并呼吁在限制年龄内容的平台引入更强的多因素防护。核心要点是：年龄识别仍是个漏洞，需要更稳健且注重隐私的设计。

items.title_en: IBM didn't want Microsoft to use the Tab key to move between dialog fields
items.title_zh: IBM 不希望微软在对话框字段间用 Tab 键切换
items.summary_en: A retro UI disagreement reveals how tab order decisions shaped early Windows product design. The anecdote highlights how tiny UX decisions influence developer workflows and product behavior. It reminds us that keyboard navigation remains a subtle but powerful UI lever.
items.summary_zh: 一则关于 UI 设计的往事揭示 IBM 不愿微软在对话框字段之间通过 Tab 键切换焦点的历史观点。该趣闻凸显了微小设计决策对开发者工作流和产品行为的影响，提醒人们键盘导航仍是重要的 UI 驱动。

items.title_en: Today I've made the difficult decision to reduce the size of Coinbase by ~14%
items.title_zh: 我决定把 Coinbase 的规模缩减约14%
items.summary_en: CEO announces a roughly 14% workforce reduction to streamline operations and refocus on core products. The move signals ongoing consolidation in crypto infrastructure and underscores the cost discipline shaping tech startups.
items.summary_zh: CEO 宣布将 Coinbase 的规模缩减约14%，以精简运营并聚焦核心产品。此举反映了加密基础设施领域持续整合的趋势，以及成本管控在科技初创公司中的作用。

items.title_en: Judge: Nvidia's Shadow Library Scripts 'Have No Other Purpose' Than Infringement
items.title_zh: 法官判定：NVIDIA 的 Shadow Library 脚本仅用于侵权
items.summary_en: A court has ruled that Nvidia's Shadow Library scripts have no legitimate purpose beyond infringement, highlighting legal risks around AI training data sourcing.
items.summary_zh: 法院裁定 NVIDIA 的 Shadow Library 脚本仅用于侵权，凸显在 AI 训练数据获取方面的法律风险与监管挑战。

items.title_en: iOS 27 is adding a 'Create a Pass' button to Apple Wallet
items.title_zh: iOS 27 将在 Apple Wallet 增设“创建凭证”按钮
items.summary_en: Apple Wallet's new Create a Pass button streamlines programmatic pass creation for tickets, loyalty cards, and IDs. Developers can automate credential generation at scale, reducing manual steps. The change raises questions about security, offline validity, and data integrity across pass ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Apple Wallet 新增“创建凭证”按钮，使凭证的批量生成和管理更为自动化，覆盖票务、积分卡与身份凭证等场景。开发者可借此规模化生成凭证，显著减少人工步骤。此变动同时带来安全、离线有效性与跨生态数据完整性等考量。

items.title_en: Mexico City is sinking so quickly, it can be seen from space
items.title_zh: 墨西哥城下沉速度之快，甚至能从太空看到
items.summary_en: Satellite imagery shows Mexico City's subsidence rate is visible from space, underscoring groundwater overuse and infrastructure risk; policymakers may need urgent management.
items.summary_zh: 卫星影像显示墨西哥城下沉速度惊人，甚至能从太空看见，反映地下水过度抽取带来的基础设施风险，需加强治理与规划。

items.title_en: EEVblog: The 555 Timer is 55 years old [video]
items.title_zh: EEVblog：555定时器诞生55周年
items.summary_en: At 55 years old, the 555 timer remains a staple in analog electronics. Its simplicity and versatility power countless hobbyist builds and teaching labs, influencing modern timing and waveform generation.
items.summary_zh: 555 定时器已诞生55周年，仍是模拟电子学的基石。它的简单性和灵活性支撑着无数爱好者项目与教学实验，至今也影响着现代定时与波形生成的设计思路。

items.title_en: I'm scared about biological computing
items.title_zh: 我对生物计算感到担忧
items.summary_en: A thoughtful piece raises safety and governance concerns as biology-based computing moves closer to mainstream use. It warns about biosecurity, reproducibility, and ethical risk in wetware-enabled computation. The message calls for careful, responsible research and policy framing.
items.summary_zh: 一篇深思熟虑的文章警示生物计算在走向主流计算时的安全、治理与潜在后果。强调生物安全、可重复性与伦理风险，呼吁负责任的研究与政策框架。

items.title_en: Why most product tours get skipped
items.title_zh: 为什么大多数产品引导被跳过
items.summary_en: Most product tours fail to engage users because they interrupt flow and overwhelm with features. The article offers practical onboarding fixes: contextual, optional guidance; focusing on value, and making tours skippable.
items.summary_zh: 大多数产品引导被跳过的原因在于打断使用流程、信息量大且缺乏即时价值。提出可操作的上手设计要点，如按场景提供上下文提示、可跳过的分步引导，以及聚焦显著价值。

items.title_en: When everyone has AI and the company still learns nothing
items.title_zh: 当人人都在用 AI，而公司却没有学到任何东西
items.summary_en: AI adoption alone doesn't guarantee organizational learning; without feedback loops, governance, and value-driven KPIs, AI programs stagnate. The piece urges embedding learning culture into AI initiatives, with measurable outcomes and user-centered design. It argues for treating AI as a process improvement tool, not a magic fix.
items.summary_zh: 单靠 AI 的普及并不能带来组织学习；若缺乏反馈机制、治理与以价值为导向的指标，AI 项目会停滞。应把学习文化嵌入 AI 计划，设定可衡量的目标并以用户为中心设计。把 AI 视为流程改进工具，而非灵丹妙药。

items.title_en: Agents for financial services and insurance
items.title_zh: 金融服务与保险领域的智能代理
items.summary_en: AI agents tailored for finance and insurance workflows aim to automate and assist regulated processes while meeting compliance and security requirements. They enable faster customer interactions, risk checks, and data analysis with traceability.
items.summary_zh: 面向金融与保险场景的智能代理，旨在在合规与安全前提下自动化与协助受监管的流程。它们可加速客户互动、风控检查与数据分析，并实现可追溯。文章强调专业化代理在不牺牲治理的前提下释放价值。

items.title_en: RFK Jr. clears path for minors to use tanning beds, much to dermatologist dismay
items.title_zh: RFK Jr. 为未成年人使用日晒浴床铺平道路
items.summary_en: RFK Jr. advocates loosening restrictions on tanning bed use for minors, drawing strong disapproval from dermatologists who warn about skin cancer risk.
items.summary_zh: RFK Jr. 公布一项主张，试图放宽未成年人使用日晒浴床的限制，皮肤科医生对此表示强烈反对，警示皮肤癌风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: Explore color palettes inspired by 3000 master painter artworks
items.title_zh: Show HN：受3000位大师画作启发的调色板
items.summary_en: Show HN: Explore color palettes inspired by 3000 master painter artworks. A project curates color palettes drawn from thousands of master artworks, giving designers ready-made hues and contrasts. It demonstrates how large collections and generative tools can translate art history into practical design assets.
items.summary_zh: Show HN: Explore color palettes inspired by 3000 master painter artworks. A project curates color palettes drawn from thousands of master artworks, giving designers ready-made hues and contrasts. It demonstrates how large collections and generative tools can translate art history into practical design assets.

items.title_en: B.C. residents baffled as shape floats through night sky
items.title_zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省居民对夜空形状的困惑
items.summary_en: Residents in British Columbia report a mysterious shape floating across the night sky, sparking speculation about UFOs, drones, or atmospheric phenomena. Local authorities and scientists typically urge caution and await clearer data.
items.summary_zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省民众在夜空中发现一个神秘形状漂浮，引发对不明飞行物、无人机或大气现象的猜想。地方机构通常呼吁保持谨慎并等待更清晰的数据。

items.title_en: FBI investigating leaks to journalist who wrote explosive article on Kash Pate
items.title_zh: FBI 正在调查与 Kash Patel 的记者相关的泄密事件
items.summary_en: The FBI is investigating leaks connected to a journalist who wrote a high-profile article about Kash Patel.
items.summary_zh: 联邦调查局正在调查与一名报道 Kash Patel 相关爆炸性报道的记者相关的泄密事件。

items.title_en: SoundOff: Low-Cost Passive Ultrasound Tags
items.title_zh: SoundOff：低成本被动超声标签
items.summary_en: Introduces low-cost passive ultrasound tags for non-invasive sensing and tracking, enabling applications in healthcare, logistics, and smart environments.
items.summary_zh: 介绍低成本被动超声标签，用于非侵入式感测与追踪，适用于医疗、物流与智慧环境等场景；对成本与可用性有潜在影响。

items.title_en: GLM-5V-Turbo: Toward a Native Foundation Model for Multimodal Agents
items.title_zh: GLM-5V-Turbo：迈向多模态代理的原生基础模型
items.summary_en: GLM-5V-Turbo outlines a native foundation model designed for multimodal agents. It integrates vision and language to support end-to-end reasoning and action across modalities. This marks progress toward more capable, pan-modal AI assistants.
items.summary_zh: GLM-5V-Turbo 提出面向多模态代理的原生基础模型，融合视觉与语言能力，支撑跨模态的推理与执行。它朝着能感知、推理并对多模态信息作出行动的端到端代理迈进。

items.title_en: Behavior-Oriented Concurrency for Python
items.title_zh: Python 的面向行为并发
items.summary_en: Introduces Behavior-Oriented Concurrency for Python (BocPy), a model that focuses on observable behaviors to structure parallel work rather than low-level threading. The approach aims to simplify Python concurrency and improve maintainability for real-world workloads.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 BocPy——一种以行为为核心来组织并发的 Python 框架或概念，意在简化并发编程并提升可维护性。探讨如何让实际工作负载受益于这种模型。

items.title_en: Show HN: Adam – An embeddable cross-platform AI agent library
items.title_zh: Show HN: Adam — 一个可嵌入的跨平台 AI 代理库
items.summary_en: Adam is an embeddable AI agent library designed for cross-platform use, enabling developers to ship autonomous agents inside their apps. It emphasizes lightweight integration, tooling for agents, and a plugin-friendly architecture.
items.summary_zh: Adam 是一个可嵌入的跨平台人工智能代理库，便于开发者在应用中集成自主代理。强调轻量级集成、代理工具链和插件式架构。

items.title_en: Building the deployment tool I wish I had
items.title_zh: 打造我一直想要的部署工具
items.summary_en: The author shares building a deployment tool tailored to their needs, highlighting practical workflows, repeatability, and failures with existing solutions. The piece offers pragmatic guidance for teams looking to streamline releases and reduce toil.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享打造符合自身需求的部署工具，强调实际工作流、可重复性，以及对现有方案的局限。为寻求简化发布、降低工作负担的团队提供实用建议。

items.title_en: Xbox CEO ends Copilot AI development and overhauls leadership
items.title_zh: Xbox 结束 Copilot AI 开发并改组领导层
items.summary_en: Xbox is restructuring its AI roadmap after ending Copilot AI development, with leadership changes signaling a strategic pivot away from this project. The move reshapes how AI features fit into future consoles and services.
items.summary_zh: Xbox 结束 Copilot AI 开发并进行领导层重组，显示在 AI 路线图上的战略转向。此举将影响未来主机和服务中的 AI 功能定位与优先级。

items.title_en: Lessons for Agentic Coding: What should we do when code is cheap?
items.title_zh: 面向代理编码的教训：当代码变得廉价时，我们该怎么做
items.summary_en: The piece argues that as creating code becomes cheap, we must emphasize reliability, security, and auditability when building agentic systems. It presents lessons on provenance, testing, and robust interfaces to avoid brittle, trust-destroying products.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张当代码成本低廉时，仍需强调可验证性、模块化和安全性，以避免代理编码下产生不可靠、难以审计的系统。提出关于溯源、测试与鲁棒接口等教训，帮助构建更可信的自动化代码。

items.title_en: Show HN: Airbyte Agents – context for agents across multiple data sources
items.title_zh: Airbyte Agents：跨数据源的代理上下文
items.summary_en: Airbyte Agents demonstrate how agents can operate with contextual knowledge across multiple data sources. This enables smarter, cross-source automation and reduces repetitive context switching. It could accelerate data workflows and democratize autonomous data tooling.
items.summary_zh: Airbyte Agents 展示了让代理跨多个数据源工作时携带上下文知识的做法，利于跨源编排和智能化数据工作流。此思路有望加速数据工具的自动化发展，降低重复的上下文切换成本。

items.title_en: Google tools for customizing searches
items.title_zh: Google 的定制化搜索工具
items.summary_en: Explains Google's tools for tailoring search results, including advanced operators and filters, helping power users prune noise and surface more relevant results.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Google 提供的定制化搜索工具，包括高级运算符与筛选器，帮助高阶用户减少噪音、快速找到更相关的结果。

items.title_en: The bottleneck was never the code
items.title_zh: 瓶颈从来不是代码
items.summary_en: The article argues that the real bottleneck in building effective AI agents isn’t code but the orchestration, data quality, and decision-making loops that feed them. It stresses that tooling, memory, and integration with real-world data often limit performance more than algorithms. Takeaway: invest in systems design and data pipelines, not just faster code.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为构建高效 AI 代理的瓶颈并非代码本身，而是编排、数据质量与决策循环等要素。强调工具链、内存管理以及与真实数据的集成往往比算法本身更能决定成效。要点是：应更多投资于系统设计和数据管线，而非单纯追求更快的代码。

items.title_en: Hand Drawn QR Codes (2025)
items.title_zh: 手绘二维码
items.summary_en: Hand-drawn QR codes show that with generous error correction and careful design, QR codes can be aesthetically customized without sacrificing scannability. It blends art with encoding, offering practical paths for branding and tactile interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 手绘二维码展示了在保持可扫描性的前提下进行美学设计的可能性，依赖错误更正和排版技巧实现艺术与编码的结合。与此同时为品牌设计和触控界面提供了可行路径。

items.title_en: CARA 2.0 – “I Built a Better Robot Dog”
items.title_zh: CARA 2.0：我打造了更好的机器人狗
items.summary_en: CARA 2.0 details improvements over the previous version, focusing on more capable locomotion, perception, and autonomous behaviors. It covers the hardware-software stack and practical lessons from building and testing a robot dog, highlighting real-world tradeoffs in power, reliability, and safety. The post serves as a hands-on look at DIY robotics progress and the limits of consumer-grade hardware.
items.summary_zh: CARA 2.0 展示了在实现更高机动性、感知与自主能力方面的进步，分享硬件/软件栈的选择以及测试中的经验教训。通过实际打造机器人狗的案例，揭示商用机器人在电力、可靠性和安全性方面的现实挑战。

items.title_en: Visualize Any Hugging Face Model
items.title_zh: 可视化任意 Hugging Face 模型
items.summary_en: HFViewer lets you visualize any model from Hugging Face, revealing architectures, layers, and weights in a browser-based explorer. It accelerates model debugging, comparison, and education for ML practitioners.
items.summary_zh: HFViewer 让你在浏览器中可视化任意 Hugging Face 模型，展示网络结构、层级和权重，便于调试、对比与教学。

items.title_en: Google Chrome silently installs 4 GB Gemini Nano AI model without consent
items.title_zh: 谷歌浏览器在未征得同意的情况下静默安装 4 GB Gemini Nano AI 模型
items.summary_en: Chrome reportedly installs a 4 GB Gemini Nano AI model on user devices without explicit consent, raising privacy and data-use concerns. The incident underscores the tension between built-in AI features and user control, and may invite scrutiny of auto-downloads in browsers.
items.summary_zh: 据称 Chrome 未经明确同意就在用户设备上安装了 4 GB Gemini Nano AI 模型，触发隐私与数据使用的担忧。这一事件凸显了浏览器内置 AI 功能牵涉的用户控制与自动下载之间的张力，或将引发审查。

items.title_en: TornadoVM
items.title_zh: TornadoVM
items.summary_en: TornadoVM is a runtime that enables dynamic compilation and execution of data-parallel tasks on CPUs and GPUs, bridging high-level languages to heterogeneous hardware. It aims to simplify acceleration of compute-heavy workloads.
items.summary_zh: TornadoVM 是一个运行时框架，支持将数据并行任务动态编译并在 CPU 与 GPU 上执行，连接高级语言与异构硬件，简化计算密集型工作负载的加速。

items.title_en: What makes a good smartphone camera?
items.title_zh: 优秀手机摄像头的关键是什么？
items.summary_en: Analyzes the factors behind a great smartphone camera, including sensor size, optics, ISP, and software processing. It emphasizes that best results emerge from optimizing the entire stack, not just hardware specs.
items.summary_zh: 分析决定手机摄像头质量的关键因素，如传感器尺寸、镜头、图像信号处理和算法软件。强调最佳效果来自硬件与软件的全面协同，而不仅仅是硬件规格。

items.title_en: Academics Need to Wake Up on AI
items.title_zh: 学术界应正视 AI
items.summary_en: The piece urges academia to catch up with AI advances, advocating updated curricula, research ethics, and collaboration with industry. It warns that lagging behind could hinder both scientific rigor and societal impact.
items.summary_zh: 文章呼吁学术界尽快跟上 AI 的进展，推动更新课程、研究伦理与产业协作。警告若滞后将削弱科学严谨性与社会影响力。

items.title_en: Am I Meant to Be Impressed?
items.title_zh: 我应该被惊讶吗？
items.summary_en: The piece challenges readers to question hype around AI progress and to calibrate expectations against real-world utility and limits. It invites skepticism about novelty and encourages deeper evaluation of impact.
items.summary_zh: 文章质疑对 AI 进展的炒作与期待，提醒读者将新颖性与实际价值和局限性对齐。它鼓励对影响进行更深入的评估，保持理性判断。

items.title_en: Mark Cuban: OpenAI Will Never Return the $1T It's Investing [video]
items.title_zh: 马克·库班：OpenAI 将永远不会归还其投资的1万亿美元（视频）
items.summary_en: Mark Cuban argues that OpenAI will not return the $1T it invests, framing the move as a long-term bet on AI rather than a short-term financial return. The video highlights investor skepticism and the tension between hype and durable value in AI platforms.
items.summary_zh: 库班认为 OpenAI 投资的资金在短期内难以或不会回本，强调这是一种对 AI 的长期投资而非短期回报。视频揭示了投资者的怀疑态度以及 AI 平台中的 hype 与长期价值之间的矛盾。

items.title_en: Wolfenstein 3D for Gameboy Color on custom cartridge (2016)
items.title_zh: Game Boy Color 上的 Wolfenstein 3D：用自制卡带实现
items.summary_en: A homebrew cartridge lets you play Wolfenstein 3D on Game Boy Color, showcasing retro hardware hacking and the challenges of squeezing PC-era games into handheld hardware. It demonstrates how enthusiasts push limits of memory, CPU speed, and cartridge tooling.
items.summary_zh: 通过自制卡带在 Game Boy Color 上运行 Wolfenstein 3D，展示了复古硬件黑客技艺以及将 PC 时代游戏塞入掌机的挑战。此项工作体现爱好者在内存、CPU 速度与卡带工具方面的极限探索。

items.title_en: A Theory of Deep Learning
items.title_zh: 深度学习理论
items.summary_en: A concise theoretical piece outlining a framework for deep learning, touching on why overparameterized models generalize and how optimization dynamics interact with data structure. It provides a high-level lens for researchers seeking intuition beyond empirical results.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇提出深度学习理论框架的高层次文章，讨论为何在过参数化的情形下模型仍能泛化，以及优化动力学如何与数据结构交互。为研究者提供直观理解问题的高层视角。

items.title_en: While the King Lives: An Old C Programming Prank in GNU Hello from 1993
items.title_zh: 当国王还在时：GNU Hello 1993 年的老 C 编程恶作剧
items.summary_en: The extended predicative Mahlo universe in Martin-Löf type theory (2023)
items.summary_zh: 回顾 1993 年 GNU Hello 的一个老式 C 编程恶作剧，展示开源社区的幽默与对跨平台兼容性的关注。

items.title_en: Batteries Not Included, or Required, for These Smart Home Sensors
items.title_zh: 这些智能家居传感器无需电池也可工作
items.summary_en: These smart home sensors operate without regular batteries, using energy harvesting or low-power design to draw power from the environment. The approach enables maintenance-free deployments, especially for remote or hard-to-reach locations, but raises questions about reliability and cost.
items.summary_zh: 这些智能家居传感器通过能量收集或低功耗设计实现不需要定期更换电池就能工作。此举可实现对偏远或难以维护位置的免维护部署，但也带来可靠性和成本方面的权衡。

items.title_en: Singapore introduces caning for boys who bully others at school
items.title_zh: 新加坡将对校园欺凌者实施鞭笞
items.summary_en: Singapore's new policy caning bullies at school sparks a debate on deterrence, ethics, and educational outcomes. The move highlights how disciplinary approaches reflect cultural norms and regulatory trade-offs in modern schooling.
items.summary_zh: 新加坡将对校园欺凌者实施鞭笞，引发关于威慑效果、伦理与教育结果的讨论。此举凸显纪律策略在现代教育中的文化取向与监管权衡。

items.title_en: Should I run plain Docker Compose in production in 2026?
items.title_zh: 在 2026 年，应该在生产环境直接运行普通 Docker Compose 吗？
items.summary_en: Plain docker-compose lacks orchestration, resilience, and predictable scaling for production workloads. The article argues for more robust deployment patterns, including Kubernetes or other orchestrators, and cautions against relying on ad-hoc Compose setups. It suggests using Compose in development or tightly controlled production contexts with strong tooling.
items.summary_zh: 纯 Docker Compose 在生产环境缺乏编排、弹性与可预测的扩展能力。建议采用更健壮的部署模式，如 Kubernetes 或其他编排工具，避免以随意的 Compose 设置执勤生产。可在开发或受控的生产场景中配合强工具链使用 Compose。

items.title_en: Comparing the Z80 and 6502 to Their Relatives
items.title_zh: Z80 与 6502 与它们的亲缘处理器对比
items.summary_en: Comparisons of classic microprocessors with related designs illuminate tradeoffs in instruction sets, performance, and hardware constraints. The piece helps readers appreciate historical engineering decisions that shape modern CPUs and computing culture.
items.summary_zh: 对经典微处理器 Z80 与 6502 及其同族设计的对比，揭示指令集、性能和硬件约束等权衡。帮助读者理解塑造现代 CPU 与计算文化的历史性工程决策。

items.title_en: Wiki Builder: Skill to Build LLM Knowledge Bases
items.title_zh: Wiki Builder：构建LLM知识库的技巧
items.summary_en: Wiki Builder helps tailor LLMs by assembling and curating knowledge bases, enabling scalable, searchable references for AI systems. It promotes structured knowledge integration to reduce hallucinations and improve factual accuracy.
items.summary_zh: Wiki Builder 能通过整合和整理知识库，帮助大语言模型更好地获取可信参考。这种结构化的知识整合有助于降低幻觉、提升事实准确性，并支持大规模知识管理。

items.title_en: Make some art with your phone sensors
items.title_zh: 用手机传感器创作艺术
items.summary_en: Make some art with your phone sensors shows how to use accelerometers, gyroscopes, microphones, and cameras to create interactive, accessible art. It demonstrates that compelling sensor-based art doesn't require specialized hardware, inviting readers to experiment.
items.summary_zh: 展示如何利用手机传感器创建互动艺术，包括加速计、陀螺仪、麦克风和摄像头的应用。该方法让艺术创作在硬件普及的基础上变得更易入门，鼓励读者自行尝试。

items.title_en: The Thinking Plant's Man (2025)
items.title_zh: Thinking Plant 的人（2025）
items.summary_en: A 2025 feature exploring the idea of intelligent plants and the researchers who study them, tracing the history of plant cognition.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年的一篇特写，探讨植物智慧及研究这一领域的人士，追溯植物认知的历史。

items.title_en: The Soul of Maintaining a New Machine
items.title_zh: 新机器维护的灵魂
items.summary_en: The Soul of Maintaining a New Machine discusses the culture of upkeep after a product launches, emphasizing communities of practice, rituals, and shared knowledge. It argues sustainable maintenance comes from collaborative routines and collective responsibility.
items.summary_zh: 讨论新产品上线后的维护文化，强调实践社区、日常仪式和知识共享的重要性，相信持续维护来自协作性日常与集体责任。

items.title_en: Virtual violin produces realistic sounds
items.title_zh: 虚拟小提琴发出逼真声音
items.summary_en: MIT researchers have created a virtual violin capable of producing highly realistic sounds, blending physical modeling and DSP/AI to capture expressive nuances. This could boost digital instrument libraries, VR/AR experiences, and remote collaborations.
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工研究人员开发的虚拟小提琴可产生极其逼真的音色，结合物理建模与数字信号处理，捕捉细腻的情感表达。将推动数字乐器库、VR/AR 体验和远程协作的发展。

items.title_en: Researchers print structural colour with an inkjet printer
items.title_zh: 研究人员用喷墨打印机实现结构色
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate printing structural color—colors arising from microstructure rather than pigments—using a standard inkjet printer. This could enable cheap, scalable color engineering for displays and cosmetics, with potential for environmentally friendly pigments.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员展示了用普通喷墨打印机实现结构色——颜色来自微结构而非颜料。此技术有望降低成本、提升尺度化颜色工程的应用，且可能更环保。

items.title_en: Underwater robot tracks sperm whale conversations in real time
items.title_zh: 水下机器人实时记录抹香鲸对话
items.summary_en: An underwater robot tracks sperm whale conversations in real time, enabling researchers to analyze vocalization patterns and social interactions. The project advances marine bioacoustics and demonstrates sensor fusion in challenging environments.
items.summary_zh: 水下机器人实时记录抹香鲸的交流，帮助研究者分析声纳模式和社交互动。该项目推动海洋生物声学研究，并展示在极端环境下的传感器融合能力。

items.title_en: I completed 100 Days of Java over 5 years and mapped the journey as a graph
items.title_zh: 我用五年完成了 100 天 Java 学习，并将过程绘成图
items.summary_en: A developer's 100 Days of Java journey spans five years, visualized as a graph to reveal learning patterns, consistency, and turning points. The post offers takeaways on deliberate practice and long-term skill growth.
items.summary_zh: 一名开发者的 100 天 Java 学习之旅横跨五年，并绘制成图表以揭示学习节奏、持续性与关键转折。文章提供关于有计划练习与长期成长的经验教训。

items.title_en: Urban Birds Are Rising Earlier Because of Traffic Noise (2013)
items.title_zh: 城市鸟类在交通噪声中更早鸣叫（2013）
items.summary_en: Urban birds sing earlier in noisy cities, a phenomenon linked to traffic noise and urbanization; the piece discusses ecological impact and potential mitigation in city planning.
items.summary_zh: 城市鸟类在交通噪声中更早鸣叫，与城市化密切相关的现象。文章探讨生态影响及在城市规划中缓解噪声的思路。

items.title_en: The extended predicative Mahlo universe in Martin-Löf type theory (2023)
items.title_zh: Martin-Löf 类型理论中的扩展可预测 Mahlo 宇（2023）
items.summary_en: The extended predicative Mahlo universe in Martin-Löf type theory surveys a sophisticated universe construction and its implications for foundations of mathematics and constructive verification. The work informs how type-theoretic universes can encode large-cardinal-like structures and influence formal proof systems.
items.summary_zh: 对 Martin-Löf 型理论中扩展的可预测 Mahlo 宇进行讨论，涉及基础数学与构造性验证的影响。该研究揭示类型理论宇宙如何编码类似大基数的结构并影响形式化证明系统。

items.title_en: Simulating Cells Fighting to the Death
items.title_zh: 细胞互相厮杀的仿真
items.summary_en: Simulating Cells Fighting to the Death presents a lightweight, approachable cellular combat model, illustrating immune interactions or competitive dynamics with simple tools. The project demonstrates how accessible simulations can illuminate biology and emergent behavior.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个简单工具实现的细胞对抗仿真，揭示免疫互动或竞争性动力学的要点，具备教育与研究演示价值。

items.title_en: Feds Fine Durham Energy Efficiency Co $722M
items.title_zh: 联邦监管机构对 Durham 能效公司罚款 7.22 亿美元
items.summary_en: Federal regulators fined Durham Energy Efficiency $722 million over alleged compliance issues in an energy efficiency program. The case underscores the importance of accurate efficiency claims and the regulatory risk faced program implementers, with implications for future incentives.
items.summary_zh: 联邦监管机构对 Durham 能效公司处以 7.22 亿美元罚款，源于对能效项目合规性与声明真实性的质疑。此案凸显准确宣称效果的重要性，以及项目实施方在未来激励措施中的监管风险。

items.title_en: How to organize 3 acquired companies into one coherent website
items.title_zh: 如何把三家被收购公司整合成一个统一网站
items.summary_en: A blueprint for organizing three acquired companies into one coherent website, covering navigation, product consolidation, redirects, and unified messaging. The guide emphasizes user-centric structure and scalable content architecture to preserve brand equity and support growth.
items.summary_zh: 提供把三家公司合并成同一个网站的结构化方案，涵盖导航、产品页整合、重定向和统一信息传达等要点。强调以用户为中心的结构和可扩展的内容架构，以保持品牌一致性和支持增长。
